events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":85,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Cotter pin omitted on castle nut — castle nut not secured against backing off","Safety-critical fastener retention missing on suspension/steering joint"],"actions":["Install correct cotter pin through castle nut and castellated hole, bend ends to secure","Torque verify castle nut to OEM spec and align castellations to nearest slot before pinning","Hold unit at quality gate until cotter pin installed and verified"],"rationale":"A castle nut requires a cotter pin to prevent loosening under vibration; omission leaves a safety-critical suspension/steering fastener unsecured and non-compliant with OEM standard work.","references":["OEM assembly standard work","OEM torque and cotter pin specification","Alignment specs"]}
